task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Onboarding Tracker** (Level 8)

Build a customer onboarding tracker. Two tables: Customers (name, company, status) and OnboardingSteps (customer_id, step_name, completed). Steps belong to Customers. Need: full CRUD on customers (auth required on mutations), full CRUD on steps (auth required on mutations), GET /api/customers/onboarding to filter by status='onboarding'.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for web and javascript backend

create a Customers table:
  name,
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend

database is local memory

owner is 'demo@example.com'

create a Customers table:
  name, required
  company, required
  status, default 'onboarding'

create a OnboardingSteps table:
  customer_id, required
  step_name, required
  completed, default false

allow signup and login

# GET - list all customers
when user calls GET /api/customers:
  customers = get all Customers
  send back customers

# GET - filter customers by status
when user calls GET /api/customers/onboarding:
  onboarding_customers = get all Customers where status is 'onboarding'
  send back onboarding_customers

# GET - get single customer
when user calls GET /api/customers/:id:
  customer = look up Customer with this id
  send back customer

# POST - create customer (requires auth)
when user calls POST /api/customers sending customer_data:
  requires login
  saved_customer = save customer_data to Customers
  send back saved_customer with status 201

# PUT - update customer (requires auth)
when user calls PUT /api/customers/:id sending changes:
  requires login
  updated_customer = look up Customer with this id
  set updated_customer's name to changes's name
  set updated_customer's company to changes's company
  set updated_customer's status to changes's status
  save updated_customer to Customers
  send back updated_customer

# DELETE - remove customer (requires auth)
when user calls DELETE /api/customers/:id:
  requires login
  delete Customer with this id
  send back 'ok' with status 204

# GET - list all onboarding steps
when user calls GET /api/customers/:id/steps:
  steps = get all OnboardingSteps where customer_id is this id
  send back steps

# POST - create onboarding step (requires auth)
when user calls POST /api/customers/:id/steps sending step_data:
  requires login
  set step_data's customer_id to this id
  saved_step = save step_data to OnboardingSteps
  send back saved_step with status 201

# PUT - update step (requires auth)
when user calls PUT /api/customers/:customer_id/steps/:step_id sending changes:
  requires login
  updated_step = look up OnboardingStep with this step_id
  set updated_step's step_name to changes's step_name
  set updated_step's completed to changes's completed
  save updated_step to OnboardingSteps
  send back updated_step

# DELETE - remove step (requires auth)
when user calls DELETE /api/customers/:customer_id/steps/:step_id:
  requires login
  delete OnboardingStep with this step_id
  send back 'ok' with status 204

# Frontend Page
page 'Onboarding Tracker' at '/':
  on page load get customers from '/api/customers'
  
  section 'Add Customer' with style app_card:
    customer_name = ''
    company_name = ''
    'Customer Name' is a text input saved as customer_name
    'Company' is a text input saved as company_name
    button 'Add Customer':
      send { name: customer_name, company: company_name } as a new record to '/api/customers'
      set customer_name to ''
      set company_name to ''
    
  section 'Customers List' with style app_card:
    display customers as table
